fields.name: Goa Beach Paradise
fields.description: Experience the magical beaches of Goa with this all-inclusive package. Enjoy pristine white sands, vibrant nightlife, and delicious Goan cuisine.
fields.highlights:
North Goa Beach Tour
South Goa Exploration
Casino Night
Water Sports
Sunset Cruise
fields.inclusions:
3 Night Hotel Stay (3-Star)
Breakfast Daily
Airport Transfers
Sightseeing by AC Vehicle
Travel Insurance
fields.exclusions:
Flights
Lunch & Dinner
Personal Expenses
Alcohol

fields.name: Kerala Backwaters Retreat
fields.description: Discover the serene backwaters of Kerala on a traditional houseboat. This package includes Munnar tea gardens, Alleppey backwaters, and Kochi heritage walks.
fields.highlights:
Alleppey Houseboat Stay
Munnar Tea Gardens
Kochi Heritage Walk
Kathakali Performance
Ayurvedic Spa
fields.inclusions:
4 Night Accommodation
All Meals on Houseboat
AC Transfers
Guide Services
Spice Plantation Tour

fields.name: Rajasthan Royal Heritage
fields.description: Walk the royal corridors of Rajasthan's magnificent palaces and forts. Experience the desert safari, folk music, and the vibrant culture of the Land of Kings.
fields.highlights:
Jaipur Pink City Tour
Amber Fort & Palace
Jodhpur Blue City
Jaisalmer Desert Safari
Udaipur Lake Palace
fields.inclusions:
6 Night Heritage Hotel Stay
All Breakfasts
Private AC Coach
Professional Guide
Camel Safari
Folk Cultural Evening
fields.exclusions:
Flights
Lunch & Dinner
Entrance Fees
Personal Expenses

fields.name: Shimla Manali Snow Escape
fields.description: Escape to the snow-capped Himalayas with this comprehensive Shimla-Manali package. Enjoy ski slopes, scenic valleys, and charming hill station towns.
fields.highlights:
Shimla Mall Road & Ridge
Kufri Snow Activities
Manali Old Town
Solang Valley
Rohtang Pass
fields.inclusions:
5 Night Hotel Stay
Breakfast & Dinner
Volvo Bus Transfers
Sightseeing
Snow Activity (Kufri)

fields.question: What is the Urban Holidays Mega Ticket Voucher?
fields.answer: The Urban Holidays Mega Ticket Gift Voucher is a ₹149 digital voucher that gives you access to exclusive travel packages across India and international destinations. Each voucher comes with a unique QR code and coupon code.

fields.question: How do I purchase a voucher?
fields.answer: Register or login to your account → Click 'Buy Voucher' → Complete payment via Razorpay (UPI, Cards, Netbanking) → Your digital voucher is instantly generated in your dashboard.

fields.question: How long is the voucher valid?
fields.answer: Each voucher is valid for 365 days from the date of purchase. The expiry date is clearly shown on your voucher and in your dashboard.

fields.question: How does the referral program work?
fields.answer: Every user gets a unique referral code. Share it with friends. When a friend registers using your code, you earn ₹50 as a wallet credit. You can view all referrals in your dashboard.

fields.name: Priya Sharma
fields.message: Bought the voucher for just ₹149 and redeemed it for an amazing Goa trip. The process was seamless and the team was very helpful!

fields.name: Rahul Verma
fields.message: Excellent service! The digital voucher with QR code is very convenient. Got a great deal on the Kerala package. Highly recommend!

fields.name: Ananya Reddy
fields.message: The referral bonus feature is amazing. I earned ₹50 extra when my friend joined. Urban Holidays is the best travel voucher platform!
